name: Blueberry Gingerbread
recipeInstructions:
1. With an electric mixer, beat together oil, sugar, salt, and molasses in a large bowl.
2. Beat in the egg until well combined.
3. In a separate bowl, combine flour, ginger, cinnamon, nutmeg, and baking soda.
4. Dredge the blueberries with 2 tablespoons of the flour mixture.
5. Gradually add the remaining flour mixture to the molasses mixture, alternating with buttermilk, beating after each addition.
6. Stir in the reserved blueberries.
7. Pour the batter into a greased and floured 12x7-1/2 inch baking dish.
8. Sprinkle the top with the remaining sugar.
9. Bake in a preheated oven at 350°F for 35-40 minutes.
10. Cut into squares and serve warm with butter, or serve with whipped cream for dessert.
